data.content:
TechNova
TechNova is a technology company that issued a press release in February 2024 announcing executive appointments and contract expansions.<SEP>TechNova is a technology company led by CEO Maria Santos and CTO Jorge Ferreira, which closed 2023 with €42M in revenue and is developing the Orion and Apollo platforms.

Carla Mendes
Carla Mendes is a TechNova representative who negotiated the Orion contract expansion with RetailCo.<SEP>Carla Mendes is TechNova's Product VP, hired from Revolut in early 2023 to lead the Orion Platform launch and co-led RetailCo's onboarding.

RetailCo
RetailCo is a client of TechNova that expanded their Orion contract to include the new ML pipeline module.<SEP>RetailCo is a TechNova client onboarded in June 2023 exclusively on Orion v1.5, reporting a 40% reduction in data processing time after migration.

Maria Santos
Maria Santos is the CEO of TechNova, to whom Lucas Pereira reports directly.<SEP>Maria Santos is the CEO of TechNova, having joined in 2018 as VP Engineering and becoming CEO in 2021. She co-signed the GlobalBank contract.

Lucas Pereira
Lucas Pereira is the newly appointed VP of Sales for the Iberian market at TechNova, previously employed at SAP Portugal where he led enterprise sales for 8 years.

Jorge Ferreira
Jorge Ferreira is a TechNova employee working on the Spanish market expansion alongside Lucas Pereira.<SEP>Jorge Ferreira is the CTO of TechNova since 2019, previously worked at Farfetch and Unbabel, and coordinated the CNPD audit response and leads the Spanish market expansion.

SAP Portugal
SAP Portugal is a technology company where Lucas Pereira previously led enterprise sales for 8 years before joining TechNova.

Orion
Orion is a software product by TechNova, with version 3.0 including a new ML pipeline module, scheduled for May 2024.

Sofia Costa
Sofia Costa is the IT Director at RetailCo who participated in negotiating the Orion contract expansion with TechNova.<SEP>Sofia Costa is RetailCo's IT Director who co-led the RetailCo onboarding onto the Orion platform.

Spanish Market Expansion
The Spanish market expansion is a TechNova initiative announced in Q4 2023, on which Jorge Ferreira and Lucas Pereira collaborate.<SEP>TechNova's 2024 initiative to expand into the Spanish market, led by Jorge Ferreira, targeting 3 enterprise clients.

ML Pipeline Module
The ML pipeline module is a new component included in Orion v3.0, added to RetailCo's contract and scheduled for May 2024.

Iberian Market
The Iberian market refers to the geographic and commercial region comprising Portugal and Spain, for which Lucas Pereira was appointed VP of Sales at TechNova.

António Carvalho
António Carvalho chairs TechNova's board, approved the €15M Orion investment, and instructed the team to maintain Apollo support until Q2 2025.

David Oliveira
David Oliveira is GlobalBank's CTO who co-signed the GlobalBank contract with TechNova.

Ana Rodrigues
Ana Rodrigues is TechNova's General Counsel who flagged non-compliant contract clauses in the GlobalBank agreement related to the EU AI Act.

Pedro Nunes
Pedro Nunes is a TechNova founding team member and lead architect responsible for the Apollo system's original architecture.

Orion Platform
The Orion Platform is TechNova's primary product, launched in March 2023, with releases v1.0, v1.5, and v2.0, and a planned v3.0 with an embedded ML pipeline in May 2024.

Apollo System
The Apollo System is TechNova's legacy platform in production since 2019, managed by Pedro Nunes, flagged for deprecation, and maintained due to contractual obligations with GlobalBank.

GlobalBank
GlobalBank is TechNova's largest client since 2021, representing 28% of total revenue, using both Apollo and Orion platforms under a contract running until December 2025.

CNPD
The Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD) issued a data governance audit request to TechNova in September 2023 covering data flows between Apollo and Orion systems.

Linklaters
Linklaters is an external legal counsel engaged by TechNova to assist with EU AI Act compliance remediation scheduled for Q1 2024.

Farfetch
Farfetch is a company where Jorge Ferreira previously worked before joining TechNova as CTO.

Unbabel
Unbabel is a company where Jorge Ferreira previously worked before joining TechNova as CTO.

Revolut
Revolut is the company from which Carla Mendes was hired to join TechNova in early 2023.

EU AI Act
The EU AI Act is a European Union regulation, specifically Article 13, with which three clauses in the GlobalBank contract were flagged as potentially non-compliant.

CNPD Audit
The CNPD data governance audit was requested in September 2023 and covered data flows between Apollo and Orion systems, particularly regarding GlobalBank data. TechNova submitted its response in November 2023.

Lisbon
Lisbon is the location where 12 engineers on the Orion team are based and where TechNova plans to hire 20 additional engineers.

Porto
Porto is a location where part of the TechNova Orion engineering team is based.

Madrid
Madrid is a location where TechNova plans to hire 5 engineers as part of its Spanish market expansion.

TechNova Annual Strategy Report Q4 2023
The TechNova Annual Strategy Report for Q4 2023 is a strategic document summarizing TechNova's financial results, product developments, key clients, regulatory matters, and 2024 priorities.

Orion V3.0
Orion v3.0 is the planned release of the Orion Platform featuring an embedded ML pipeline, scheduled for May 2024.

ML Pipeline
The ML pipeline is an embedded machine learning component planned for inclusion in Orion v3.0, scheduled for launch in May 2024.
